Event: Mushroom Loot - April 2026
Event Date: 09/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR403
Crouching Tiget Plate Mail

Every now and then, the fighter steals 20% physical and magical armor and resilience from all enemy fighters for 5 s.

With a 65% chance, when taking damage, the fighter's physical and magical armor and resilience increase by 12% for 4 s. Maximum 10 effects.

Every 3 sec, the fighter deals physical damage to all enemy fighters equal to 150% of their physical armor and restores health equal to 50% of the damage dealt.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
